feedItems.description: allocated £8.8m to Council Running Costs (≈£82 per resident)
allocated £6.4m to Environment & Streets (≈£59 per resident)
allocated £2.4m to Culture & Leisure (≈£22 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £108 (4.7%) to £2413
